title: cordula × kimballiana
intro: Cordula × kimballiana, also known as Bee Balm, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, and its extracts have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Cordula × kimballiana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to reap its health benefits.
